meaning: adj.裸体的,无遮盖的,无装饰的,无保护的,[律]无证据的,未证实的
examples: Most stars are not visible to the naked eye.
It sounds inconceivable but is the naked truth.
The crash stripped him of everything, leaving him naked except for the elastic of his socks.
"The heat causes the wires to expand, imperceptibly to the naked eye, " Donovan said.
